zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernard-Roger de Foix於0981年之前出生在法國藍多-盧希隆奧德卡爾卡頌時，他的父親Roger Ier de Carcassonne31歲，母親Adélaide de Rouergue-Melgueil31歲。他於大約1005年與Garsinde de Bigorre在法國奧德卡爾卡頌結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1036年8月28日在法國米迪-列內斯阿利艾福瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bernard-Roger de Foix于0981年之前出生在法国藍多-盧希隆奧德卡爾卡頌时，他的父亲Roger Ier de Carcassonne31岁，母亲Adélaide de Rouergue-Melgueil31岁。他于大约1005年与Garsinde de Bigorre在法国奧德卡爾卡頌结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1036年8月28日在法国米迪-列內斯阿利艾福瓦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Foix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Fox
meanings: English: nickname from a word denoting the animal (Middle English, Old English fox), widely used to denote a sly or cunning individual. It was also used for someone with red hair. In England this surname absorbed some early examples of surnames derived from the ancient Germanic personal names mentioned at Faulks and Foulks .
Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an tSionnaigh ‘son of the fox’ (see Tinney ).
Irish: also adopted for Ó Catharnaigh, see Kearney .

en.lifeSummary: When Bernard-Roger de Foix was born before 0981, in Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, his father, Roger Ier de Carcassonne, was 31 and his mother, Adélaide de Rouergue-Melgueil, was 31. He married Garsinde de Bigorre about 1005, in Carcassonne, Aude, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 28 August 1036, in Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernard-Roger de Foix est né avant 0981, à Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Roger Ier de Carcassonne, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adélaide de Rouergue-Melgueil, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Garsinde de Bigorre environ 1005, à Carcassonne, Aude, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 28 août 1036, à Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernard-Roger de Foix vor 0981 in Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Ier de Carcassonne 31 und seine Mutter Adélaide de Rouergue-Melgueil 31. Er hat um 1005 in Carcassonne, Aude, Frankreich Garsinde de Bigorre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 28. August 1036 in Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard-Roger de Foix è nato il prima del 0981 nel Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, il suo padre, Roger Ier de Carcassonne, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Adélaide de Rouergue-Melgueil, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Garsinde de Bigorre circa 1005, nel Carcassonne, Aude, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 28 agosto 1036, nel Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernard-Roger de Foixが0981年以前にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンアウドカーカソンで生まれた時，父Roger Ier de Carcassonneは31歳，母Adélaide de Rouergue-Melgueilは31歳であった。約1005年にフランスアウドカーカソンでGarsinde de Bigorreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1036年8月28日にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスアリeッジフォイックスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard-Roger de Foix(이)가 0981년 이전 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 오드 카르캐손에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Ier de Carcassonne(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Adélaide de Rouergue-Melgueil(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1005년 프랑스 오드 카르캐손에서 Garsinde de Bigorre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1036년 8월 28일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 애리e지 포이스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard-Roger de Foix nasceu antes 0981, em Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Roger Ier de Carcassonne, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adélaide de Rouergue-Melgueil, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Garsinde de Bigorre aproximadamente 1005, em Carcassonne, Aude, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1036, em Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernard-Roger de Foix родился перед 0981 г. в местности каркассонн, ауд, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger Ier de Carcassonne было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adélaide de Rouergue-Melgueil, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Garsinde de Bigorre около 1005 г. в местности каркассонн, ауд, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 28 августа 1036 г. в местности фоикс, ариeдж, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernard-Roger de Foix nació antes de 0981, en Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, su papá, Roger Ier de Carcassonne, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Adélaide de Rouergue-Melgueil, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Garsinde de Bigorre aproximadamente 1005, en Carcassonne, Aude, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1036, en Foix, Ariège, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia.
